# Daily Report — 2026-07-18

## Task Completed
Added `get_catalog_category` tool (GET sc_category/{sys_id}), completing the create/list/update/get set for catalog categories. The tool accepts a `category_id` (sys_id), returns a 404 guard on missing records, normalises all reference fields with `sysparm_display_value=true`, and surfaces extra fields (`full_description`, `header_icon`, `homepage_renderer`) not returned by the list endpoint.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 2311
- Coverage: 93%
- All passing: yes

## Security
Pre-existing findings only (setuptools PYSEC-2026-3447, urllib3 PYSEC-2026-142/141, wheel CVE-2026-24049). No new vulnerabilities.

## Files Changed
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/catalog_tools.py` — added `GetCatalogCategoryParams` model and `get_catalog_category` function
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/__init__.py` — imported and exported `get_catalog_category`
- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py` — imported `GetCatalogCategoryParams` and `get_catalog_category_tool`; registered in tool registry
- `config/tool_packages.yaml` — added `get_catalog_category` to `catalog_builder` and `full` packages
- `tests/test_get_catalog_category.py` — 12 new tests (params, 404, empty result, network error, extra fields, URL check, display_value params, HTTP error, inactive, parent field)
